title: Glamorous Egyptian Tofu Tagine
description: A salty and juicy lacto-vegetarian tagine dish featuring marinated tofu, perfect for a date night.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained and cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: In a small bowl, combine olive oil, paprika, cumin, coriander, ginger, and cayenne pepper to make the marinade.
In a large bowl, whisk together marinade and lemon juice; add tofu and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove tofu from marinade, allowing any excess to drip off. Place tofu on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake tofu for 20-25 minutes or until lightly browned on the edges.
While tofu is baking, heat a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add chopped olives and cook for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Add dried dates and cook for 2-3 minutes or until puffed.
Remove tofu from the oven and add to the tagine or Dutch oven.
Stir to combine and cook for 2-3 minutes or until tofu is coated in the date and olive mixture.
Garnish with parsley and serve hot.
